items.text: 🚨 $SPCX - SPACEX COULD SOAR 440%, SAYS RAYMOND JAMES Raymond James launched SpaceX coverage with a Strong Buy rating and a Street-high $800 target, implying 440% upside. The bullish outlook is driven by Starship, Starlink, and SpaceX’s potential as a global infrastructure giant.
